title: The Mikvah Experience: What Actually Happens When You Convert
title_zh: 浸礼池体验:皈依时究竟会发生什么
title_he: חוויית המקוה: מה באמת קורה כשמתגיירים
author: Torah Light Editorial Team
target_audience: Prospective converts to Orthodox Judaism, particularly Chinese/Asian background
cultural_parallels: Water as threshold in Chinese folklore
summary: A comprehensive, step-by-step guide to the mikvah (ritual immersion) experience during Orthodox Jewish conversion. Covers practical preparation, physical requirements, emotional dimensions, and spiritual significance. Includes Chinese cultural parallels relating to water symbolism and transformation rituals.
key_takeaways: The mikvah marks the legal and spiritual moment of becoming Jewish
Three full immersions are required, with a blessing after the first
The experience often evokes powerful emotions of rebirth and transformation
Water symbolism in Chinese tradition parallels Jewish concepts of purification and renewal

bibliography.title: The Women's Guide to the Mikvah
bibliography.author: Bracha Davidowitz

seo_description: Complete guide to the mikvah experience during Jewish conversion: what happens, how to prepare physically and spiritually, and what to expect emotionally. Includes Chinese cultural parallels.
